name: nextcloud/intros
description: Nextcloud Intros - Onboarding tour for Files

scripts.build: vite --mode production build && cp dist-tmp/js/intros-files.js js/intros-files.js && cp node_modules/shepherd.js/dist/css/shepherd.css css/intros-files.css && rm -rf dist-tmp
scripts.dev: vite --mode development build && cp dist-tmp/js/intros-files.js js/intros-files.js && cp node_modules/shepherd.js/dist/css/shepherd.css css/intros-files.css && rm -rf dist-tmp
